title: My Modpack
body:
## Modpack Overview:
This modpack is designed for **Minecraft 1.12.2**, bringing together a curated selection of mods that enhance gameplay and provide utility features. Whether you're exploring, crafting, or managing resources, these mods add depth and convenience to your Minecraft experience.

### Key Features:
- **Utility Enhancements:** Mods like *Jade* offer useful information overlays, making in-game interactions smoother.
- **Magical Adventures:** Dive into the world of arcane arts with *Thaumcraft*, giving players magical tools and spells to discover.
- **Inventory and Equipment Management:** With *Baubles*, expand your inventory and manage special equipment slots for an enriched RPG-like experience.

### Mods with Attribution:
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) - overrides/mods/Jade-0.1.0.jar
- [Baubles](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/baubles) - overrides/mods/Baubles-1.12-1.5.2.jar
- [Thaumcraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumcraft) - overrides/mods/Thaumcraft-1.12.2-6.1.BETA26.jar

These mods are used with permission and follow the guidelines of their respective licenses.

### Content Restrictions:
Some mods are not included in this modpack due to licensing or permission restrictions. For a complete list of mods excluded from this pack, or if you wish to use them, please consult their original authors for further permission.

### Intended Use:
This modpack is specifically created for use on a private server, and is not intended for general distribution. It remains unlisted on Modrinth but can be accessed via direct link. Please ensure the included mods are properly configured for both client and server environments, depending on your setup.
